openaiSpec.name: generate_coach_csv
openaiSpec.description: Generate a downloadable .csv file from raw CSV data, optionally appending a 'Product Image' column containing a Coach-specific Google Sheets =IMAGE formula.

csv_raw.description: The raw CSV data generated by the model.

apply_formula.description: If true, the plugin triggers the formula generation logic to append a new column titled 'Image Link'.

sku_column_identifier.description: The column header name or letter (e.g., 'C' or 'SKU') containing the style data.
